case_title: SALVADOR PONCE et al VS. MARITZA HERRERA

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD FILED BY PONCE, SALVADOR HERRERA, MARITZA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-11-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PONCE, SALVADOR CASTILLO, BRENDA OLIVA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HERRERA, MARITZA COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF FAILED TO PROVE DEFENDANT WAS NEGLIGENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY PONCE, SALVADOR CASTILLO, BRENDA OLIVA AS TO DEFENDANT HERRERA, MARITZA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-11-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PONCE, SALVADOR CASTILLO, BRENDA OLIVA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00) SERVED AUG-24-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HERRERA, MARITZA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-11-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-11-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANTS' EXHIBITS RETAINED. COURT ORDERS PLAINTIFF TO SUBMIT EXHIBITS TO D506 NO LATER THAN 9/15/09. CLERK: L. FISCELLA. NOT REPORTED. (506)
